raw:
From: priya.rao@example.com
To: helpdesk@example.com
Subject: URGENT: VPN keeps disconnecting every 2 minutes
Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 09:14:32 +0000
Message-ID: <ce9a7-incident-1@example.com>

Hi team,

I've been completely unable to work this morning. The corporate VPN drops every couple of minutes and I have to reconnect. This started around 8:50 AM. I'm on Windows 11, using the Cisco AnyConnect client v4.10. My department is sales. I have a client demo at 11 AM and need this fixed urgently.

Thanks,
Priya Rao
Sales — EMEA

From: marcus.lin@example.com
To: helpdesk@example.com
Subject: Can't sign in to Salesforce — SSO error
Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 10:02:11 +0000
Message-ID: <ce9a7-incident-2@example.com>

Hello,

When I try to log in to Salesforce via SSO I get an error page that says "AADSTS50105: The signed in user is not assigned to a role for the application". I was working fine yesterday. Several colleagues on my team are seeing the same thing this morning.

Marcus Lin
Finance

From: dorothy.kim@example.com
To: helpdesk@example.com
Subject: printer
Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 11:30:00 +0000
Message-ID: <ce9a7-incident-3@example.com>

it doesn't work

From: harish.shah@example.com
To: helpdesk@example.com
Subject: VPN disconnects every minute or two
Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 09:32:08 +0000
Message-ID: <ce9a7-incident-4@example.com>

Hi,

The corporate VPN is dropping every minute or two. Started this morning. Using AnyConnect. Need urgent help, client call at noon.

Harish
Sales — APAC

From: ceo@example.com
To: helpdesk@example.com
Subject: My laptop won't power on
Date: Tue, 12 May 2026 07:45:12 +0000
Message-ID: <ce9a7-incident-5@example.com>

My MacBook is completely unresponsive. I have a board meeting in 90 minutes and need this resolved immediately.

Sent from my phone
